title: Disc Recipes
description: A mod adding recipes for music discs with the idea of people creating support for their custom discs
body:
This 100% totally original mod adds simple recipes to obtain most of the music discs in survial. This allows support for all types of discs and as well as a simple way of adding support for custom discs.

## Empty Discs
![Blank Discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uBtHdEml/images/8d02e18739374d96c922ec944f66c9936cb9baf1.png)

The Empty Discs are the base for any disc recipe. These are made from a noteblock and 4 iron. These combined with certain items make your desired disc.

The Broken ones are made when you stonecut a regular empty disc. This allows you make broken discs like 11.
The fragments are another option when stonecutting a regular empty disc. These can be use to make disc fragments like 5. 

![Disc Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uBtHdEml/images/270764a286d6065ac04d55231cffee007a02d3a2.png)

## Basic Discs
These are the regular looking discs made from dyes and other items like redstone or slime.

![Basic Disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uBtHdEml/images/81bf7648b7304759fc4f0641507a9537fde78ac9.png)

## Advanced Discs
These are the more colourfull disc with the disc itself looking stuff like netherrack. This usally require harder items like gold or diamonds to craft as well as materials to make the disc themselves.

![Advanced Discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uBtHdEml/images/03fba19a27c6e03b3aed5c35a994f030d22edd09.png)
